label: HVAC — Design pass
description: Block load → audit topology → auto-size ducts → balance system → NC check → pressure-class audit → validate. The standard HVAC engineer's pre-issue sequence. Respects the active scope and sizing-strategy radio set on the HVAC dock panel.

steps.label: Auto-size ducts (strategy + scope from HVAC panel)
NC prediction (VDI 2081 / ASHRAE A48 + regenerated noise)
Flag stale sizes vs current flow
Run v4 validators (+ healthcare if applicable)

notes: Block load opens the pass so downstream sizing reads the per-space HVC_PEAK_* stamps (Phase 187 BlockLoadEngine).
Each step opens its own transaction; on cancel the partial work commits but later steps are skipped.
The HVAC panel WorkflowGrid records every step + status.
NC step requires a duct selection — the command surfaces a guidance dialog and exits cleanly if no selection is active.
Edit <project>/_BIM_COORD/workflow_overrides.json to swap individual steps for project-specific commands.
